summary: Report output changes from the assessment app can affect proposal generation and formatting.
recommended_validation: Regenerate proposal from a current assessment output sample.
Validate client-facing formatting, public-safe language, and PDF/print layout before treating downstream output as ready.

summary: The assessment app consumes generated demand data; schema or semantic changes upstream can alter Customer Demand Fit report behavior.
recommended_validation: Check schema compatibility against active demand dataset.
Run sample report generation for supported local-service sectors.

summary: Assessment reports can now include Welding demand fit and estimated monthly searches in demand opportunities; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and optional monthly volume fields.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from a Welding assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting for monthly search counts and null-volume records.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.

summary: Assessment reports can now include Senior Living demand fit and estimated monthly searches in demand opportunities; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and optional monthly volume fields.

Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.

summary: Assessment reports can now include expanded Real Estate demand fit with 290 evaluated records and optional Keyword Planner monthly search counts; downstream proposal generation should handle larger opportunity sets and monthly-volume fields.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from a Real Estate assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting with larger demand opportunity sets and optional monthly search counts.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.

summary: Assessment reports can now include expanded Cleaning demand fit with city-level Keyword Planner counts and new Restoration & Remediation demand fit; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and larger Cleaning opportunity set.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from a Cleaning assessment output sample with city-level monthly search counts.
Regenerate a proposal from a Restoration & Remediation assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting for larger opportunity sets, zero-volume Keyword Planner rows, and null-volume records.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.

summary: Assessment reports can now include AI Solutions demand fit with 269 evaluated records and optional Keyword Planner monthly search counts; downstream proposal generation should handle the new sector label and AI-specific opportunity language.
recommended_validation: Regenerate a proposal from an AI Solutions assessment output sample.
Verify proposal formatting for AI consulting, automation, chatbot, agent, training, and provider-selection opportunities.
Confirm client-facing language treats Keyword Planner counts as estimates, not guaranteed demand.
